pr.title: Document send-quiz-email pricing audit (no template changes required)
pr.body:
This task required a full review of `supabase/functions/send-quiz-email/index.ts` to detect legacy MXN pricing, old service names (`Escapada/Aventura/Expedición`), or any remaining references to the deprecated 3-tier model. The function content was already aligned, so no email template edits were needed.

- **Scope audited**
  - Reviewed the full immediate post-quiz email template in `supabase/functions/send-quiz-email/index.ts`.
  - Checked for disallowed legacy terms/prices and old 3-tier pricing references.

- **Result**
  - No legacy MXN prices, old service names, or active 3-tier structure references were found in `send-quiz-email`.
  - Sender identity remains unchanged: `Nomaderia <hola@nomaderia.com>`.

- **Repository documentation update**
  - Added a new changelog entry in `docs/pending-tasks.md` recording:
    - full audit completion,
    - no-code-change outcome for the Edge Function,
    - TypeScript verification completion.

```ts
from: "Nomaderia <hola@nomaderia.com>",
```
pr.author: Copilot
